channel.title: 2026-02-03 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-02-03 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Disclinations, Dislocations, and Emanant Flux at Dirac Criticality
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Maissam Barkeshli, Christopher Fechisin, Zohar Komargodski, and Siwei Zhong
Author(s): Maissam Barkeshli, Christopher Fechisin, Zohar Komargodski, and Siwei Zhong Topological quantization of artificial magnetic flux at lattice defects in gapless crystals provides a measurable mechanism for generating electrical currents and observing new topological invariants. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011017] Published Tue Feb 03, 2026
